---
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "extra.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    seal: false
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: '16:9'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
##xaringan::inf_mr()
## For offline work: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown/some-tips.html#working-offline
## Images not appearing? Put images folder inside the libs folder as that is the main data directory

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
##library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)

# Input the report data
data1 <- read_excel("../../Course_History/2023-Spring/Project-SP23/Mirror_Class_Folder_Structure/Data/GII-2021-Tidy.xlsx", na = "NA")
```

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-data_blue_v3.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle, inverse

.size80[**Today's Agenda**]

<br>

.size60[
Build the First Report

- Section 4: Univariate Analyses (Trends)
]

<br>

.center[.size40[
  Justin Leinaweaver (Spring 2024)
]]

???

## Prep for Class
1. Post Section 4 assignment details on Canvas

<br>

*Canvas*
1. Analyze the main index (`gii`) in 1991, 2006 and 2021 (Figs 5a, 5b and 5c)
2. Analyze one of the component measures from Section 3 in 1991, 2006 and 2021 (Figs 6a, b and c)


---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-class: center
class: middle

.size45[**Report 1: Analyzing our Outcome Variable(s)**]

<br>

.size40[**Section 3: What do the measures currently show us?**

1. Analyze the main index (`gii`) with a **histogram** (Fig 1) and a **map** (Fig 2)
    
2. Analyze **at least two** of the component measures with visualizations (Figs 3 and 4)
]

???

### Does everybody have their four figures for Section 3 finished? 

- THAT was the assignment for today!



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-class: center
class: middle

.size50[**Report 1: Analyzing our Outcome Variable(s)**]

.size50[
1. What is it and why is this project important?

2. How confident should we be in the methodology?

3. What do the measures currently show us?

4. How are these measures changing across time?
]

???

Today we'll shift to building the visualizations you need for Section 4

<br>

Again, the goal is to get the figures you need built today.
- Then polish!

<br>

We'll use our class time on Friday to share what you've made and discuss analyses for the report.


---

background-image: url('libs/Images/07_2-GII_All_Import2.png')
background-size: 87%
background-position: center
class: middle, slideblue

???

Let's import the across time data

1. Name it, and

2. ID the NA argument used

<br>

**SLIDE**: Task for today



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-class: center
class: middle

.size40[**Report 1: Analyzing our Outcome Variable(s)**]

<br>

.size40[**Section 4: How are these measures changing across time?**

1. Analyze the main index (`gii`) in 1991, 2006 and 2021 (Figs 5a, 5b and 5c)
    
2. Analyze **one** of the component measures from Section 3 in 1991, 2006 and 2021 (Figs 6a, b and c)
]

.right[.size30[<sup>*</sup> Use the filter() from tidyverse to make subsets of the data]]

???

You MUST choose one of the component measures you selected for Section 3

AND

Just like on Monday, don't polish, just get these visualizations built!

<br>

### Questions?

<br>

For Friday you should polish the figures you will use in your report for Section 4.
